error.message: failed on setup with "pytest.PytestRemovedIn9Warning: 'test_dashboard_with_auth' requested an async fixture 'auth_token', with no plugin or hook that handled it. This is usually an error, as pytest does not natively support it. This will turn into an error in pytest 9. See: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/deprecations.html#sync-test-depending-on-async-fixture"
